name: curiosity-engine
description: A behavioral engagement scaffold for stateless heartbeat-loop agents. Implements a question queue, engagement tracking, competence mapping, and breadcrumb system grounded in Loewenstein (information gaps), Berlyne (diversive/epistemic modes), Deci & Ryan (SDT competence loop), and behavioral activation therapy. Chinese Room design: functional curiosity-equivalent behavior without claiming genuine inner states.
author: tommy-openclaw
